response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content. Identified instrumental intro (00:00-03:57) and song performance (03:57-end).
2. Identified song title "今日も大天才っ！" and composer "小池竜暉" and performer "一条莉々華" from on-screen text.
3. Simplified artist for search: "小池竜暉". Used search query '"今日も大天才！" 小池竜暉 lyrics Japanese and English' on DuckDuckGo.
4. Extracted and translated lyrics from found sources (Genius, UtaNet, etc.) to complete the required JSON.
response.global_summary: This video features an introductory segment followed by a live performance of the song "今日も大天才っ！" (Kyou mo Dai Tensai!) by the virtual artist Ichijou Ririka, for her birthday celebration in 2025.

scenes.description: Instrumental intro featuring chibi characters and on-screen text "余莉々華生誕祭2025".
The performance of the song "今日も大天才っ！" by Ichijou Ririka begins on a virtual stage. Title and artist credits appear on-screen.
